events.text: A ComedySportz match is an awesomely exciting comedy show played as a sport!If you come to see ComedySportz, you'll see one Referee and two teams of Players, one red and one blue--competing against each other in improv games based on the suggestions of the fans watching the match! There are seven to ten games per match, with the occasional willing volunteer joining us up on the field to help the hilarity ensue!Performed in our Main Arena. Tickets are $12 per person.Bar and Restaurant open at 6:00pm, seating begins at 7:00pm.No age restriction.
events.name: ComedySportz Match Friday 7:30pm
events.rich_text:
A ComedySportz match is an awesomely exciting comedy show played as a sport!

If you come to see ComedySportz, you'll see one Referee and two teams of Players, one red and one blue--competing against each other in improv games based on the suggestions of the fans watching the match! There are seven to ten games per match, with the occasional willing volunteer joining us up on the field to help the hilarity ensue!

Performed in our Main Arena. Tickets are $12 per person.

Bar and Restaurant open at 6:00pm, seating begins at 7:00pm.

No age restriction.

events.text: Join us for a night of laughs and fun at the ComedySportz Workshop Student Showcase!  Come show your support for our talented students as they take the stage and showcase their improvisational comedy skills. Get ready to witness hilarious scenes, clever jokes, and unexpected twists as our students perform in various improv games. Don't miss out on this one-of-a-kind comedy experience that will have you laughing all night long! Admission is free! Bar and restaurant open at 6:00pm, showcase begins at 7:30pm.

events.text: Since its start in 2001, the Midnite Show has provided an alternative, unique twist on improv comedy in Milwaukee.The Midnite Show is Milwaukee's uncensored improv comedy troupe.The shows are sometimes dirty, irreverent, silly or satirical, but one thing they always aim to be is funny.Tickets go on sale at the door at 11:00pm. No reservations or presales. First come, first served.$10 per person, cash only.Show takes place in our side theater.18 Years or older.Please note that the Midnite Show is not a ComedySportz match; all coupons, passes, gift cards etc for ComedySportz are not applicable for this event.  Like our Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/midnite.show), follow us on Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/midniteshow/), and check out our merch (https://www.belowthecollar.com/midniteshow).
events.name: The Midnite Show
events.rich_text:
Since its start in 2001, the Midnite Show has provided an alternative, unique twist on improv comedy in Milwaukee.

The Midnite Show is Milwaukee's uncensored improv comedy troupe.

The shows are sometimes dirty, irreverent, silly or satirical, but one thing they always aim to be is funny.

Tickets go on sale at the door at 11:00pm. No reservations or presales. First come, first served.

$10 per person, cash only.

Show takes place in our side theater.

18 Years or older.

Please note that the Midnite Show is not a ComedySportz match; all coupons, passes, gift cards etc for ComedySportz are not applicable for this event.

Like our Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/midnite.show), follow us on Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/midniteshow/), and check out our merch (https://www.belowthecollar.com/midniteshow).

spots.name: ComedySportz Milwaukee
spots.description: Whether you’re looking for a fun family-friendly match to keep the weekend’s fun, for something for your corporate group working remotely, or something fun to keep your staff educated and entertained, we have you covered!
spots.rich_description: Whether you’re looking for a fun family-friendly match to keep the weekend’s fun, for something for your corporate group working remotely, or something fun to keep your staff educated and entertained, we have you covered!

email_posts.description:
Join us for a night of laughs and fun at the ComedySportz Workshop Student Showcase! Come show your support for our talented students as they take the stage and showcase their improvisational comedy skills. Get ready to witness hilarious scenes, clever jokes, and unexpected twists as our students perform in various improv games. Don't miss out on this one-of-a-kind comedy experience that will have you laughing all night long! 

Admission is free!

Bar and restaurant open at 6:00pm, showcase begins at 7:30pm.
email_posts.subject: ComedySportz 104 Student Showcase at ComedySportz Milwaukee
email_posts.original_main_section_content: Join us for a night of laughs and fun at the ComedySportz Workshop Student Showcase!  Come show your support for our talented students as they take the stage and showcase their improvisational comedy skills. Get ready to witness hilarious scenes, clever jokes, and unexpected twists as our students perform in various improv games. Don't miss out on this one-of-a-kind comedy experience that will have you laughing all night long! Admission is free! Bar and restaurant open at 6:00pm, showcase begins at 7:30pm.

email_posts.description:
A ComedySportz match is an awesomely exciting comedy show played as a sport!

If you come to see ComedySportz, you'll see one Referee and two teams of Players, one red and one blue--competing against each other in improv games based on the suggestions of the fans watching the match! There are seven to ten games per match, with the occasional willing volunteer joining us up on the field to help the hilarity ensue!

Performed in our Main Arena. Tickets are $12 per person.

Bar and Restaurant open at 6:00pm, seating begins at 7:00pm.

No age restriction.

email_posts.description:
Since its start in 2001, the Midnite Show has provided an alternative, unique twist on improv comedy in Milwaukee.

The Midnite Show is Milwaukee's uncensored improv comedy troupe.

The shows are sometimes dirty, irreverent, silly or satirical, but one thing they always aim to be is funny.

Tickets go on sale at the door at 11:00pm. No reservations or presales. First come, first served.

$10 per person, cash only.

Show takes place in our side theater.

18 Years or older.

Please note that the Midnite Show is not a ComedySportz match; all coupons, passes, gift cards etc for ComedySportz are not applicable for this event.

Like our Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/midnite.show), follow us on Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/midniteshow/), and check out our merch (https://www.belowthecollar.com/midniteshow).

email_posts.description:
•SATURDAY, JULY 25•8PM•$15 CASH• Somebody once told me that the Drunken Boyos are ready to get Shrek’d through song, scenes, and sketch. Join your favorite Milwaukee Improvisers as they journey through the iconic DreamWorks masterpiece. Shrek 5 ain’t got nothin’ on this. UNCENSORED (18+) TICKETS: $15 each ~~~CASH ONLY~~~ RESERVATION PACKAGES AVAILABLE: Please email drunkenshows@gmail.com with the name, package, and number of people. Normal Reservation - No up charge, any number of tickets will be held at the door under the name provided. Tipsy Package - Minimum of 4 tickets. Includes reserved and priority seating, Jell-O shots for the entire group, a six-pack of beer OR a four-pack of White Claws, and a handmade thank you from the cast! (Cost: 4 tickets will be $75 cash at the door on the day of the show.) Drunken Package - Minimum of 4 tickets. Includes everything in the Tipsy package, however instead of a six-pack of beer or a four-pack of White Claws you receive vouchers for a round of single mixers for the table. (Cost: 4 tickets will be $90 cash at the door on the day of the show.) The Ogre Package - Minimum of 4 tickets. Includes everything in the Drunken package, plus 1 Drunken T-Shirt, 1 Drunken pint-glass, 1 Drunken shot-glass, 1 Drunken bottle-opener, and Drunken stickers. (Cost: 4 tickets will be $120 cash at the door on the day of the show.)

Show to take place in our side theater.

Please note: This is not a ComedySportz match. All tickets, passes, coupons, giftcards etc. for ComedySportz are not applicable for this event.

Side Effects Sketch Show

Friday October 23rd

Side Effects is a fast-paced live sketch comedy show featuring original sketches by emerging local writers and performers. Every sketch is new, and no show is ever the same. Featuring an opening stand-up act and a local musical guest, Side Effects showcases fresh comedic voices in an evening of entirely original live entertainment.  

$10 at the door: cash, card, and Venmo all accepted. The show takes place in the side theater. Ages 18+.

Side Effects is not a ComedySportz match. All tickets, passes, coupons, gift cards etc. for ComedySportz are not applicable for this event.
